blocks.code:
(define (count-parens s)
  (define (walk i depth maxd count)
    (if (>= i (string-length s)) (list count maxd)
      (let ((ch (string-ref s i)))
        (cond ((= (string-ref s i) "(")
               (walk (+ i 1) (+ depth 1) (if (> (+ depth 1) maxd) (+ depth 1) maxd) (+ count 1)))
              ((= (string-ref s i) ")")
               (walk (+ i 1) (- depth 1) maxd count))
              (else (walk (+ i 1) depth maxd count))))))
  (walk 0 0 0 0))
(define (score-code src)
  (let ((len (string-length src))
        (stats (count-parens src)))
    (dict
      "length" len
      "paren-count" (nth stats 0)
      "max-depth" (nth stats 1)
      "lines" (length (string-split src "\n"))
      "verdict" (cond ((> (nth stats 1) 5) "over-nested")
                      ((> len 800) "too-long")
                      ((< len 30) "too-small")
                      (else "acceptable")))))
(define sample "(define (fact n) (if (< n 1) 1 (* n (fact (- n 1)))))")
(define sample-score (score-code sample))
(define self-src "(define (score-code src) ...)")
(define self-score (score-code self-src))
(list (list "sample-score" sample-score)
      (list "self-assessment" self-score))

(define (count-parens s)
  (define (walk i depth maxd count)
    (if (>= i (string-length s)) (list count maxd)
      (let ((ch (string-ref s i)))
        (cond ((= (string-ref s i) "(")
               (walk (+ i 1) (+ depth 1) (if (> (+ depth 1) maxd) (+ depth 1) maxd) (+ count 1)))
              ((= (string-ref s i) ")")
               (walk (+ i 1) (- depth 1) maxd count))
              (else (walk (+ i 1) depth maxd count))))))
  (walk 0 0 0 0))
(define (score-code src)
  (let ((len (string-length src))
        (stats (count-parens src)))
    (dict
      "length" len
      "paren-count" (nth stats 0)
      "max-depth" (nth stats 1)
      "lines" (length (string-split src "\n"))
      "verdict" (cond ((> (nth stats 1) 5) "over-nested")
                      ((> len 800) "too-long")
                      ((< len 30) "too-small")
                      (else "acceptable")))))
(define sample "(define (fact n) (if (< n 1) 1 (* n (fact (- n 1)))))")
(define sample-score (score-code sample))
(define self-src "(define (score-code src) ...)")
(define self-score (score-code self-src))
(list (list "sample-score" sample-score)
      (list "self-assessment" self-score))
